grip: BLOCKED (exit 1)
planes: behavior · governed modules: 2 · ungoverned: 0

blocking violations (1):
  ✖ [behavior.unratified-change] src/checkout (src/checkout/index.ts:1) — module src/checkout's boundary placeOrder at src/checkout/index.ts:1 changed its observable output but the pinned snapshot was not re-ratified — restore the behavior or run `grip ratify behavior src/checkout` to pin the new output.
